summary_en: ＮＣＤ cancelled treasury stock. Permanent share-count reduction lifts per-share economics.
summary_jp: ＮＣＤが自己株式消却を実施。発行済株式数が恒久的に減少。

summary_en: ＮＣＤ announced a material dividend change (progressive policy). Reframes the return-of-capital baseline.
summary_jp: ＮＣＤが配当方針変更を開示（累進配当方針）。資本還元基準が刷新。

summary_en: ＮＣＤ authorised a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: ＮＣＤが自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。
